summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, reports no security-sensitive job refs, and disables merge/fix/raise_pr plus low-signal and instant closeout. Open PRs are therefore classified independently for maintainer/backlog handling; the one already-closed PR is skipped as closed. Five job-listed refs were not present in the hydrated artifact, so they are scoped needs_human for missing live preflight state rather than planned mutation.
